name: ground_truth_ac2_account_types_compliant
description: Ground-truth fixture from active Example System IATT CCIS workbook (row 7, CCI-002110, assessed 2026-05-27). Compliant verdict based on DD2875 template and RBAC documentation confirming organizational account types are defined. Narrative uses 'Reviewed' and 'confirmed' affirming phrases — validator should classify as COMPLIANCE_AFFIRMING and accept on first attempt. Evidence type: policy/procedural documentation.

ccis_row.guidance: 002110: The organization defines the information system account types that support the organizational missions/business functions.
ccis_row.procedures: The organization conducting the inspection/assessment obtains and examines the documented information system account types to ensure the organization being inspected/assessed defines the information system account types that support the organizational missions/business functions.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- DD2875 Template — system access authorization request form defining account type categories (system administrator, user, privileged, service).
- RBAC Documentation — role-based access control policy enumerating account types mapped to mission/business functions.

llm_stub_proposals.narrative: Examined DD2875 template and RBAC documentation; confirmed via the documented role catalog that organizational account types (system administrator, user, privileged, service) are defined to support mission/business functions.
